title: Fix Table Heading Size Mismatch (H4 to H5)
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want all table headings to be the same size, so that the page looks visually consistent.
description: Fix a heading size mismatch where some table headings were still using H4 instead of the standardized H5. All table headings should use H5 for consistent sizing across the application.
acceptance_criteria: All table headings use H5 instead of H4
Heading sizes are consistent across all pages
ux_changes: Fixed remaining H4 table headings to H5 for consistent sizing.
implementation_notes: Follow-up to MBT-191 where some headings were missed during the initial H4→H5 standardization.
comment_summary: Developer updated all remaining instances and apologized for the inconsistency.
